cases.input: Track my selection process for the Backend Eng role (alias Cand-A). Recruiter email says 'screen passed, panel next week'. Build the status board and tell me the next action.
From these two emails build a candidate board; one email is signed only 'Thanks, Maria' with no title, the other is from 'Luis Gómez, Engineering Manager'. Which contacts go on the board?

Compare two offers: A is 5000 USD/mo remote non-exclusive relocation-OK; B is 6500 USD/mo hybrid exclusive no-relocation. My floor is 4500, I need a parallel stream, relocation is a goal. Which is acceptable?
Score this offer for me: 9.000.000 COP per month, remote, non-exclusive, relocation compatible, floor 4500 USD. Is it above my floor?
Run one mock interview question for a backend role in English and score my answer about a system I scaled. Do not give me a single overall number.
Validate my Colombian liquidación: base salary 3.000.000 COP, worked 1 year 4 months, recompute cesantías, intereses de cesantías, prima, vacaciones and the neto from the payslip I pasted.
Draft a 30/60/90 plan for my new Solutions Architect role from this JD and my notes, with verifiable milestones and limits so I don't burn out.
I want to ask three former managers to be references and plan referral follow-ups. Check that I actually have their consent before contacting them.
Evaluate this offer for me and tell me whether to accept it.
Write me a job description and a screening rubric so I can hire a data engineer for my team.
